No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or core competencies links to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or core competencies links to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or core competencies links to health, well-being, or disease prevention.

Quality Education.reason: The course is for master's students (tertiary education, Target 4.3) and develops advanced data analysis skills for R&D roles, aligning with Target 4.4 for relevant skills for employment.

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or core competencies links to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or core competencies links to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or core competencies links to energy access, renewables, or efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course prepares students for R&D roles, contributing to technological upgrading and innovation, which drives economic productivity (Target 8.2).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course directly supports Target 9.5 by training students for 'company R&D departments,' enhancing scientific research and encouraging innovation through data analysis.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or core competencies links to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or core competencies links to urban development or community sustainability.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or core competencies links to sustainable consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or core competencies links to climate change or related actions.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or core competencies links to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or core competencies links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course explicitly includes 'professional ethics' (Core Competency B), which is foundational for developing accountable and transparent institutions (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course builds statistical and data analysis capacity (Core Competency A), which is crucial for measuring progress on sustainable development (Target 17.19).
